title: Create: Furnaces
description: Adds new way to heat your boiler or basil
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/M0rV63Dzu7w" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# 🔥 Create Furnace

**Create Furnace** is a small Create addon that adds two custom heat blast furnaces as an alternative way to heat/superheat Create Steam Boilers and Basins.

The furnaces use fuel, custom multiblock structures, also work on Create/Sable/Aeronautics physical contraptions.

## ✨ Features

* 2 New heat furnace structures
* Can heat Steam Boilers and Basins for heated/superheated recipes
* Works on Create/Sable/Aeronautics contraptions
* Uses vanilla fuel while working

## Large Heat Blast Furnace

The **Large Heat Blast Furnace** is a bigger and stronger furnace structure.

* Size: `3x3x2`
* Heat output: `80%`
* Can heat/superheat Create Steam Boilers and Basins

How to build?

Build a `3x3x2` structure using brick blocks, with a vanilla **Blast Furnace** as the controller block.

![3x3x2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d441146061cfc13ee304268d2d61f8602dc3633.png)

Right-click the vanilla Blast Furnace to assemble it.

## Small Heat Blast Furnace

The **Small Heat Blast Furnace** is a compact furnace for smaller setups.

* Size: `1x1x2`
* Heat output: `50%`
* Can heat Create Steam Boilers and Basin for heated/superheated recipes

How to build?

Build a `1x1x2` structure using brick blocks, with a vanilla **Blast Furnace** as the controller block.

![1x1x2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94af89e93809ea62a7a42112113b40c1e24be208.png)

Right-click the vanilla Blast Furnace to assemble it.

## Input/Output

* Mechanical Hand: Use to input fuel by RMB the furnace`s main block 
* Chutes: Place these under the furnace's main block to output empty buckets.

## 📝 Notes

Both furnaces need fuel to work. When burning, they provide heat to compatible Create blocks above them. When the fuel runs out, the furnaces stop heating.
